summary: Read-only R4 review from durable source/provenance lens. Inspected MEMORY.md DinoBrain entries, OS completion docs, RAG OS consensus, source-lineage implementation/verifier/status, health/goal wiring, Observatory/public-data safety surfaces. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED due implementation/verification scope risk: source-lineage docs are strong, but current classifier can mark project memories and accepted factual memories as internal/project records without verified source support, so completion could be falsely green for factual claims outside tagged 20_Wiki records.
decisions: R4 verdict is REVISE_REQUIRED, not because P0-06 is absent, but because the current source-lineage enforcement scope is narrower than the documented completion condition.
The plan/docs require factual or public claims to link to verified chunks or durable artifacts, anchor-only records not to count, health/goal/Observatory wiring, and public-data safety checks.
Implementation correctly rejects anchor-only support, missing provenance, dangling claim paths, missing verification, missing chunk body, and missing source URI for covered fixtures.

Risk: src/source-lineage.ts treats 40_Projects as project_memory and only requires source truth mainly for 20_Wiki records with source_status/tags, leaving 40_Projects and 50_Instances accepted factual/public claims potentially unblocked.

Public-data safety is a separate useful gate with blockers/warnings, but the current report is degraded with many warnings and should remain a completion concern until triaged or explicitly accepted by policy.
next_steps: Broaden source-lineage required-source classification to all factual/public/external/high-risk claims across 20_Wiki, 40_Projects, and non-behavior 50_Instances/accepted records, unless explicitly classified as internal behavior/session evidence with a reason.
Add regression fixtures for unsupported factual claims in 40_Projects and non-behavior accepted memory, plus anchor-only support in those roots.
Require status:source-lineage and verify:goal to fail when any claim-bearing record is unclassified rather than defaulting to internal/project memory.
Resolve public-data safety warnings or document which warning classes are acceptable before final completion claims.
search_queries: DinoBrain source provenance claim anchor verified public-data MEMORY.md
